items.title: US and Iran reach tentative deal to extend ceasefire, US officials say
items.dek: But there has been conflicting information from Tehran, with one news agency reporting that no deal has been finalised or confirmed.
items.body: But there has been conflicting information from Tehran, with one news agency reporting that no deal has been finalised or confirmed.

items.title: Man jailed for 15 years over plot to attack Taylor Swift concert in Vienna
items.dek: A 21-year-old Austrian man admitted planning the attack and other terrorism-related offences.
items.body: A 21-year-old Austrian man admitted planning the attack and other terrorism-related offences.
